description: This file defines an object 'HistorySerializer' that provides custom serialization and deserialization functions for 'HistoryEntry' objects into a compact JSON-like string format. It includes methods to serialize a list of entries, parse a serialized string back into entries, and handles escaping of special characters. The serializer is designed to avoid external dependencies and is tailored to a specific data structure used within an Android Kotlin project.

methods.name: serialize
methods.description: Serializes a list of HistoryEntry objects into a compact JSON string.

methods.name: deserialize
methods.description: Parses a serialized string back into a list of HistoryEntry objects.
